title: Bridge Essay: Microglia-Mediated Neurodegeneration in Perinatal Brain Injuries.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Microglia-Mediated, Neurodegeneration, in, Perinatal, Brain.

**Microglia-Mediated Neurodegeneration in Perinatal Brain Injuries.** — Biomolecules. PMID: 33451166. DOI: 10.3390/biom11010099. Perinatal brain injuries, including encephalopathy related to fetal growth restriction, encephalopathy of prematurity, neonatal encephalopathy of the term neonate, and neonatal stroke, are amajor cause of neurodevelopmental disorders. They trigger cellular and molecular cascades that lead in many cases to permanent motor, cognitive, and/or behavioral deficits.
